---
name: נושא
description: "צור ערכת נושא חדשה מתיאור בשפה חופשית. השתמש כשמבקשים ערכת נושא, סכמת צבעים, או סגנון ויזואלי — לדוגמה: אפור בהיר מינימלי, כהה ירוק יער, חם ומקצועי. מגדיר את כל טוקני ה-HSL, כותב tokens.css, tailwind preset ו-preview.html. אל תשתמש להעברת ערכה קיימת — לכך קיים skill עיצוב."
---

# Theme Creation Skill

Use this skill to generate a complete new design theme from a short description.

## Step 1 — Gather input

Ask the user (or infer from their message) for:

1. **Theme name** — a short identifier (e.g. `cool-slate`, `warm-sand`, `forest-dark`)
2. **Background mood** — light / dark / special (e.g. very-dark, ultra-light, warm, cool, neutral)
3. **Primary color hint** — e.g. navy, slate, forest green, burgundy, charcoal
4. **Accent color hint** — e.g. gold, teal, coral, lavender, mint
5. **Radius feel** — sharp (4px) / balanced (8–12px) / rounded (16px+)
6. **Density** — compact / comfortable / spacious

If any are missing, use sensible defaults based on the background mood.

---

## Step 2 — Derive HSL tokens

Use this derivation logic for a **light theme**:

| Token | Derivation rule |
|---|---|
| `background` | user background hue, saturation 8–18%, lightness 92–96% |
| `foreground` | same hue family, saturation 40–55%, lightness 10–18% |
| `card` | background hue, saturation +4%, lightness +2–3% |
| `primary` | primary color hint → saturation 50–70%, lightness 14–22% |
| `primary-foreground` | near-white warm: accent hue, saturation 60–80%, lightness 94–97% |
| `secondary` | background hue, saturation 20–35%, lightness 86–92% |
| `secondary-foreground` | same as foreground |
| `muted` | background hue, saturation 10–20%, lightness 88–93% |
| `muted-foreground` | foreground hue, saturation 15–25%, lightness 34–42% |
| `accent` | accent color hint → saturation 55–75%, lightness 42–52% |
| `accent-foreground` | primary token (dark on bright accent) |
| `destructive` | `0 70% 50%` (keep stable) |
| `destructive-foreground` | primary-foreground token |
| `border` | background hue, saturation 25–35%, lightness 68–76% |
| `input` | background hue, saturation 18–28%, lightness 78–86% |
| `ring` | accent token |
| `radius` | from user radius feel |
| `sidebar-background` | same as card or slightly lighter |
| `sidebar-primary` | same as primary |
| `sidebar-accent` | background hue, saturation 25–35%, lightness 88–94% |
| `sidebar-border` | same as border |
| `sidebar-ring` | same as ring |

For a **dark theme** (when background lightness ≤ 40%):

| Token | Derivation rule |
|---|---|
| `background` | primary hue, saturation 30–50%, lightness 5–10% |
| `foreground` | accent hue or warm neutral, saturation 10–20%, lightness 90–96% |
| `card` | background hue, saturation similar, lightness +3–4% |
| `primary` | primary hue, saturation 60–80%, lightness 28–36% |
| `muted` | background hue, saturation 20–30%, lightness 11–15% |
| `muted-foreground` | background hue, saturation 15–20%, lightness 60–68% |
| `accent` | accent hue, saturation 55–70%, lightness 38–46% |
| `border` | background hue, saturation 25–35%, lightness 18–24% |

---

## Step 3 — Output files

### 3a) Write `design-transfer-kit/themes/<theme-name>/tokens.css`

Use this exact structure:

```css
/* Theme: <theme-name> — generated by ערכות-נושא skill */
:root {
  --background: <H S% L%>;
  --foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --card: <H S% L%>;
  --card-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --popover: <H S% L%>;
  --popover-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --primary: <H S% L%>;
  --primary-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --secondary: <H S% L%>;
  --secondary-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --muted: <H S% L%>;
  --muted-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --accent: <H S% L%>;
  --accent-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --destructive: 0 70% 50%;
  --destructive-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --border: <H S% L%>;
  --input: <H S% L%>;
  --ring: <H S% L%>;
  --radius: <Xrem>;
  --sidebar-background: <H S% L%>;
  --sidebar-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --sidebar-primary: <H S% L%>;
  --sidebar-primary-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --sidebar-accent: <H S% L%>;
  --sidebar-accent-foreground: <H S% L%>;
  --sidebar-border: <H S% L%>;
  --sidebar-ring: <H S% L%>;
}

.dark {
  /* dark variant — derive from same hue family */
}
```

### 3b) Write `design-transfer-kit/themes/<theme-name>/tailwind.preset.ts`

**IMPORTANT:** Do NOT copy from any existing file. Write this content directly (it is always the same — it only references CSS vars):

```ts
import type { Config } from "tailwindcss";

export const themePreset: Partial<Config> = {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        background: "hsl(var(--background))",
        foreground: "hsl(var(--foreground))",
        card: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--card))", foreground: "hsl(var(--card-foreground))" },
        popover: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--popover))", foreground: "hsl(var(--popover-foreground))" },
        primary: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--primary))", foreground: "hsl(var(--primary-foreground))" },
        secondary: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--secondary))", foreground: "hsl(var(--secondary-foreground))" },
        muted: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--muted))", foreground: "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))" },
        accent: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--accent))", foreground: "hsl(var(--accent-foreground))" },
        destructive: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--destructive))", foreground: "hsl(var(--destructive-foreground))" },
        border: "hsl(var(--border))",
        input: "hsl(var(--input))",
        ring: "hsl(var(--ring))",
        sidebar: {
          DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--sidebar-background))",
          foreground: "hsl(var(--sidebar-foreground))",
          primary: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--sidebar-primary))", foreground: "hsl(var(--sidebar-primary-foreground))" },
          accent: { DEFAULT: "hsl(var(--sidebar-accent))", foreground: "hsl(var(--sidebar-accent-foreground))" },
          border: "hsl(var(--sidebar-border))",
          ring: "hsl(var(--sidebar-ring))",
        },
      },
      borderRadius: {
        lg: "var(--radius)",
        md: "calc(var(--radius) - 2px)",
        sm: "calc(var(--radius) - 4px)",
      },
    },
  },
};
```

### 3c) Write `design-transfer-kit/themes/<theme-name>/preview.html`

**IMPORTANT:** Do NOT copy from any existing file. Generate the full HTML from scratch using the template below — just fill in the actual HSL values and HEX colors for the new theme.

**DO NOT modify any existing project CSS files** (index.css, globals.css, tailwind.config.ts, etc.). Only create new files inside `design-transfer-kit/themes/<theme-name>/`.

Template structure for preview.html:
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="he" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>ערכת נושא: <THEME-NAME> — Preview</title>
<style>
  :root {
    /* === paste derived :root tokens here === */
  }
  .dark {
    /* === paste derived .dark tokens here === */
  }
  * { box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; }
  body { background:var(--background); color:var(--foreground); font-family:'Assistant',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; padding:32px; line-height:1.5; }
  h1 { font-size:26px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px; }
  h2 { font-size:18px; font-weight:600; margin:32px 0 12px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom:6px; }
  #toggle { position:fixed; top:16px; left:16px; background:var(--primary); color:var(--primary-foreground); border:none; border-radius:var(--radius); padding:8px 16px; cursor:pointer; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; }
  .swatch-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr)); gap:12px; }
  .swatch { border-radius:var(--radius); overflow:hidden; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--card); }
  .swatch-color { height:56px; width:100%; }
  .swatch-label { padding:8px 10px; font-size:12px; }
  .swatch-name { font-weight:600; }
  .swatch-hex { color:var(--muted-foreground); font-size:11px; }
  .btn { padding:8px 18px; border-radius:var(--radius); border:none; font-size:14px; font-weight:600; cursor:default; }
  .btn-row { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; align-items:center; }
  .demo-card { background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:20px; max-width:340px; box-shadow:0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0/0.06); }
  .form-input { background:var(--input); color:var(--foreground); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:8px 12px; font-size:14px; outline:none; width:100%; font-family:inherit; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<button id="toggle" onclick="document.body.classList.toggle('dark')">מצב כהה / בהיר</button>
<h1>ערכת נושא: <THEME-NAME></h1>
<p style="color:var(--muted-foreground);margin-top:4px;"><THEME-DESCRIPTION-ONE-LINE></p>

<h2>Semantic Colors</h2>
<div class="swatch-grid">
  <!-- one .swatch per token with actual hsl() and hex values -->
</div>

<h2>Buttons</h2>
<div class="btn-row">
  <button class="btn" style="background:var(--primary);color:var(--primary-foreground)">Primary</button>
  <button class="btn" style="background:var(--secondary);color:var(--secondary-foreground)">Secondary</button>
  <button class="btn" style="background:var(--accent);color:#fff">Accent</button>
  <button class="btn" style="background:var(--destructive);color:var(--destructive-foreground)">Destructive</button>
  <button class="btn" style="background:var(--muted);color:var(--muted-foreground)">Muted</button>
</div>

<h2>Card Example</h2>
<div class="demo-card">
  <div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px">כותרת כרטיסייה</div>
  <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted-foreground);margin-bottom:16px">טקסט תיאור משני — muted-foreground.</div>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
    <button class="btn" style="background:var(--primary);color:var(--primary-foreground);font-size:13px;padding:6px 14px">אישור</button>
    <button class="btn" style="background:var(--secondary);color:var(--secondary-foreground);font-size:13px;padding:6px 14px">ביטול</button>
  </div>
</div>

<h2>Form Input</h2>
<input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="שדה לדוגמה..." style="max-width:320px">

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Assistant:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
</body>
</html>
```

---

## Step 4 — Validate token harmony

Before writing, verify:

- Foreground on background contrast ≥ 4.5:1 (WCAG AA) — if not, push lightness further apart
- Accent must be readable on both background and primary
- Border must be visible but not aggressive — lightness diff from background should be 15–25%
- Ring should match accent exactly
- Card should be distinguishable from background — at least 2% lightness difference

---

## Step 5 — Report to user

After writing files, output:

1. A compact color table with all 20+ tokens (Token / HSL / HEX)
2. Path to the new `tokens.css`
3. Path to the new `preview.html` — instruct user to open it in browser
4. One-liner copy instruction: "Copy `design-transfer-kit/themes/<name>/tokens.css` into your project's main CSS and import it."

---

## Examples of valid theme requests

| User says | Background | Primary | Accent | Radius |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| "אפור בהיר ומיוחד" | cool grey, 93% | slate 18% | soft teal 44% | 10px |
| "כהה ומינימלי" | dark navy 7% | blue 30% | cyan 40% | 6px |
| "חם ומקצועי" | warm sand 93% | burgundy 16% | gold 46% | 12px |
| "ירוק יער רך" | warm off-white 95% | forest 18% | sage accent 44% | 14px |
| "סגול פסטלי" | lavender 94% | deep purple 20% | lilac 50% | 16px |
